name: Lat Pulldown
setup: Sit at lat pulldown machine, thighs under pads
Grip bar wider than shoulder-width (wide or medium)
Lean back slightly (~15 degrees), chest up
execution: Pull bar to upper chest, elbows drive down and back
Control bar up to full arm extension (no heavy eccentrics)
common_mistakes: Leaning too far back (turns into row)
Using body momentum to move weight
Not going to full stretch at top
Pulling bar behind the neck (shoulder strain)
cues: Imagine crushing an orange in your armpits
Bar touches upper chest, not neck
